extract: Iron Island (Japanese: 鋼鉄島 Steel Island) is an island off the western coast of Sinnoh. It is only accessible via ship from Canalave City. The cave on Iron Island was once a prosperous ore mine, but it was shut down after the ore reserves dried up. Since then, it has been kept open as a training area and habitat for wild Pokémon. Byron, Riley, and the members of the Canalave Gym come here to train, as did Roark in his childhood. Team Galactic Grunts are also found within the abandoned mine.
